content:
---

### IV. | MONETIZATION PHILOSOPHY

- No extractive commodification
- Products emerge from artistic process
- Transparency in modular licensing + documentation
- Community/peer-based versions available where possible

---

### V. | COMMERCIAL INFRASTRUCTURE PLANS

- [ ] Shopify-style storefront (lite kit-based or aesthetic artifact based)
- [ ] Patreon or Private Vault for subscribers/supporters
- [ ] Grant-writing kit / artist support deck
- [ ] GitHub public licensing templates per tool/module

---

### VI. | SYMBOLIC MODE

- Products are not just commodities—they are **rituals**, **maps**, and **keys** to enter the ecosystem
- Every output is tagged by:
